description_long: This is a modern laptop with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The device features a large, rectangular screen with a thin bezel, paired with a full-sized keyboard that includes a function row and a numeric keypad. The touchpad is prominently placed below the keyboard, outlined with a red accent, and the keyboard itself has white keycaps with clear labeling. The laptop's chassis appears to be constructed primarily from plastic or metal, with a brushed texture on the palm rest area. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the lid or palm rest. The laptop is shown open, with the screen off and no visible ports or connectors on the sides.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a large screen, full keyboard, and red-accented touchpad. The device has a modern, angular design and a brushed texture on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open screen, full keyboard, and red-accented touchpad; the laptop's thickness and hinge design are visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view of the closed lid, displaying a plain matte black surface with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the open screen, keyboard, and touchpad, with the laptop's angular profile and hinge visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the entire keyboard layout, large screen, and centrally placed touchpad with a red border.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad; white keycaps with clear labeling.
